title: npm install
content: npm i scbe-aethermoore — installs the package globally

title: pip install
content: pip install scbe-aethermoore — Python package from PyPI

title: Python version check
content: Run python --version. Need 3.11+. If not installed: winget install Python.Python.3.11 (Windows) or brew install python@3.11 (Mac)

title: import hangs on Windows
content: If importing src.crypto or hydra hangs, it's because __init__.py eagerly loads scipy/matplotlib. Fixed in v3.3.1+ with lazy imports. Update: pip install --upgrade scbe-aethermoore

title: selftest command
content: python scbe.py selftest — runs smoke test to verify installation
